englishDefinitions: A situation in which a small or less important part is controlling the whole thing.
When a minor force or detail is influencing a much bigger one.
persianTranslation: جزء کوچک بر کل مسلط شده
چیزی که باید تابع باشد، کنترل را به دست گرفته
examples: Some people think the marketing team is the tail wagging the dog.
In that project, the tail wagging the dog became a real problem.
When one employee starts making all the decisions, it feels like the tail wagging the dog.
